metadata.description: Name of the Log Analytics / Sentinel workspace

properties.displayName: Entra ID - Impossible travel between successful sign-ins
properties.description: Two successful sign-ins for the same user imply a travel speed > 900 km/h over > 500 km. Complements Entra Identity Protection; tune speed/distance to reduce VPN false positives.
properties.query: SigninLogs | where ResultType == 0 | extend lat=toreal(LocationDetails.geoCoordinates.latitude), lon=toreal(LocationDetails.geoCoordinates.longitude), City=tostring(LocationDetails.city) | where isnotempty(lat) | order by UserPrincipalName asc, TimeGenerated asc | serialize | extend pLat=prev(lat), pLon=prev(lon), pTime=prev(TimeGenerated), pUser=prev(UserPrincipalName), pCity=prev(City) | where pUser == UserPrincipalName | extend DistanceKm=2*6371*asin(sqrt(pow(sin((radians(lat)-radians(pLat))/2),2)+cos(radians(pLat))*cos(radians(lat))*pow(sin((radians(lon)-radians(pLon))/2),2))) | extend HoursApart=datetime_diff('minute',TimeGenerated,pTime)/60.0 | extend SpeedKmh=iff(HoursApart>0,DistanceKm/HoursApart,0.0) | where SpeedKmh > 900 and DistanceKm > 500 | project TimeGenerated, UserPrincipalName, FromCity=pCity, ToCity=City, DistanceKm=round(DistanceKm,0), SpeedKmh=round(SpeedKmh,0)
